title: (UP TO $4000)  6mths Temp Insurance Officer  #TNKA
description:
Job Summary

This position supports compliance with Automatic Exchange of Information regimes such as FATCA and CRS by verifying data accuracy and quality in regulatory reports and assisting in quality assurance for operational service excellence.

Near Eunos MRT
(Completion bonus: 0.5 month, Salary up to S$4,000)

Responsibilities

  • Verify data in system records to ensure accuracy for regulatory reporting under FATCA and CRS frameworks
  • Apply due diligence to interpret and check information before entering data to maintain data integrity
  • Support annual remediation and reporting exercises by assisting in data correction and validation tasks
  • Review risk control coverage to identify gaps and recommend improvements for compliance and operational effectiveness
  • Complete ad-hoc tasks and projects assigned by Supervisor or Head to support team objectives
  • Collaborate with team members to maintain high standards of data quality and operational service

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Minimum diploma in any discipline
  • At least 1 year of experience in data maintenance or administrative duties
  • Ability to organize multiple tasks, prioritize work, and meet deadlines consistently
  • Analytical skills to produce accurate and meticulous work outputs
  • Teamwork and customer service orientation to support collaborative work environment
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint to manage and present data effectively
  • High integrity and accountability in handling work responsibilities
  • Initiative to improve processes and adaptability to change|

Frederick Tan

The Outsourcing Team

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA Lic: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
